action.reasoning: Observation: predict.py crashed with libsndfile error during dataloader. Likely some test files fail to load with sf.read or are corrupt. Analysis: Need robust error handling in predict.py to skip/zero out failed reads. Also reduce num_workers might help. Decision: Add try/except in TestDS, return zeros on failure. Also use num_workers=2 to be safe.
action.command: ls checkpoints/ && python -c "import torch; ckpt=torch.load('checkpoints/best.pt', map_location='cpu'); print(list(ckpt.keys()))"
